name: counter
tagline: How many times have you unlocked your phone?

name: peep
tagline: Hide and show your status bar with one tap!

changelog.changes:
- Fix preferences not loading
- Add number of taps option
- Fix 'cached' status bar showing on lock screen sometimes
    - Thanks [@ItsNicho1as](https://twitter.com/ItsNicho1as) for the help

- Add official support for hiding inside of apps
- Add the ability to hide on the lockscreen and show on the homescreen and vice versa
- General bug fixes and performance improvements
- Official iOS 11 support

- Peep is now stable!
- Reduce tweak conflicts by appending peep_ to all ``%new`` methods
